$comment: Claude Code plugin manifest. Distribution conventions may vary by client; this file is intentionally minimal and self-describing. See docs/install.md for publishing notes.
name: explain-panel-skills
description: Two Claude skills that turn any codebase into a fully populated ExplainPanel documentation component for React/Next.js or Vue/Nuxt.

skills.name: explore-pipeline
skills.description: Analyze any codebase and produce docs/pipeline-map.json

skills.name: explain-panel
skills.description: Generate an ExplainPanel component from docs/pipeline-map.json
